name: 1688 Product Import
description: Import products from 1688 links into 24fulfill. Extracts product data via Python scripts, AI-optimizes product information (title translation, category, HS code), then submits via API with admin authentication.
review: All scripts execute correctly, properly scrape and process product data, and the workflow pipeline functions as expected. Error handling is robust and documentation is detailed and accurate.

drax_results.notes: Product import and AI optimization workflow verified. API integration confirmed.

catalog_note: Approved for publication. High-quality implementation with excellent documentation.
